name: Can I get surgery paid if back worse from lifting at work?
description: Yes, comp pays work-related surgery—use approved docs[1].

mainEntity.name: Can I get surgery paid if back worse from lifting at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, comp pays work-related surgery—use approved docs[1].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, if doctor deems necessary and work-related.** Comp covers approved treatments[1][2]. **Key factors:** Authorized providers, IME agreement. **Practical guidance:** Follow referrals, appeal denials, track costs. Future care included[1]. **Utah orders reimbursements[1].**
